content: Audit done. PTY A/B = illustrative placeholders for N-zone fleet (mild drift, acceptable; descriptions already note N-zone reality). Logs A/B accurately map to ARCHITECT/runtime/<dispatchId>/activity/<participantId>.jsonl. Edges pty.write→PTY, PTY→Log (heredoc), Log→fs.watch all accurate. No attribution confusion with Renderer-UX or Dispatch-Coordination. Edits needed: none. Details in ARCHITECT/outputs/Zone-Fleet.md.
